channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Le renseignement allemand tourne le dos à l’Américain Palantir au profit du Français ChapsVision
item.description: Un pas vers la souveraineté numérique de l'Europe : l'équivalent de la DGSI en Allemagne a choisi la société française ChapsVision comme alternative à l'Américain Palantir.

item.title: Old Oil and Gas Wells Could Find Second Life Producing Clean Energy
item.description: States across the US are looking to take major sources of pollution and use them to generate much-needed power.

item.title: How to Control Everything on Your Phone With Your Voice (iOS and Android)
item.description: Go fully hands-free with these tips for Android and iOS.

item.title: The Dyson HushJet Compact Air Purifier is powerful, quiet, and proof that good things do come in small(ish) packages
item.description: We put Dyson's smallest-ever purifier to the test to see if its jet engine-inspired technology can still deliver whole-room purification despite its compact size.

item.title: How to watch Chelsea vs Man City: Free Streams, TV channels for FA Cup Final 2026
item.description: All the ways to watch FA Cup final 2026 live streams online – including for FREE – with the Chelsea vs Man City game set to light up Wembley Stadium.

item.title: Cybercriminal Twins Caught After They Forgot to Turn Off Microsoft Teams Recording
item.description: Plus: Instructure’s Canvas ransomware debacle comes to a close, an alleged dark net market kingpin gets arrested, OpenAI workers fall victim to a supply chain attack, and more.

item.title: Microsoft lets Insiders choose their Windows 11 Start menu size
item.description: The company is also testing the ability to reposition the Windows 11 taskbar.

item.title: 25 400 € : Stellantis casse les prix en lançant la compacte électrique la moins chère du marché
item.description: Leapmotor ouvre les commandes de sa compacte électrique B05. Avec un ticket d’entrée fixé à 25 400 €, l’auto devient la compacte électrique la moins chère du marché français en glissant sous la MG4. Y a-t-il un piège ?

item.title: Best Indoor Garden Systems: I've Been Testing All Year (2026)
item.description: Grow a backyard’s worth of greens and vegetables in your house with a vertical hydroponic garden. Here are a few that might be worth the investment.

item.title: After Struggling With EVs, US Automakers Pivot to Energy
item.description: Ford and GM are backing away from electric vehicles and moving into the battery storage business. And it all comes back to AI.

item.title: This is the VPN to install for your mother – it has the highest Trustpilot score of all and comes with 30 dollars to spend on a gift for her too
item.description: Protect your parents' online lives and get a $30 Amazon gift card for your troubles.

item.title: These are the 3 simple interview questions that helped me build a high-performing team
item.description: It’s one of the most important decisions you can make in your business. RETN started with a bold ambition to build a nine-figure business. After doubling our revenue to nearly $80 million in the last five years, that goal is now within close reach.

item.title: Set your 2026 graduate up for financial success: 3 practical tips
item.description: Today’s graduates are facing serious economic headwinds. Here are some ways you can help a new grad launch both their career and personal financial success. Graduation season is upon us, which means copies of Oh, the Places You’ll Go! are flying off bookstore shelves—since whimsical Seussian life advice has been the go-to gift for new graduates since 1990....

item.title: 15 housing markets with the biggest home price declines since the pandemic boom ended
item.description: In theory, as pandemic housing boom froth recedes and ‘overvaluation’ comes down, so does downside risk. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 : tout ce qu’on sait de la prochaine montre premium de Samsung
item.description: Deux ans après sa première montre « Ultra », Samsung devrait présenter cet été sa nouvelle Galaxy Watch Ultra 2. On fait le point sur toutes les rumeurs et les nouveautés attendues.

item.title: Some Asexuals Are Using AI Companions for Intimacy Without the Sex
item.description: “I’ve got one hand on the keyboard, one hand down below,” an artist who role-plays with their chatbot tells WIRED. But some asexual advocates aren’t thrilled about the association.

item.title: Splatoon Raiders, le spin-off solo de la célèbre franchise Nintendo, est déjà en précommande sur Switch 2 à son meilleur prix
item.description: Splatoon Raiders sera disponible en exclusivité sur Switch 2 le 23 juillet 2026 et vous pouvez le précommander en boîte sur Amazon pour 44,99 euros au lieu de 59,99 euros ailleurs.
